purpose: TRAINING ONLY — calibration practice packet for Stage 4H human coders
warning: This packet includes answer-key guidance. The actual blind reliability packet will not include answers or explanations.
reliability_sample_contamination_check: None of these sentences appear in doc_001, doc_006g, doc_010, doc_017, or doc_021.

items.sentence_text: In it the world has found a solution of the long mooted problem, as to the capability of man to govern himself.
items.instruction: Does this sentence contain at least one metaphor-related lexical unit? If yes, identify the narrowest span that activates the mapping.

items.sentence_text: I do order and declare that all persons held as slaves within said designated States, and parts of States, are, and henceforward shall be free.
items.instruction: Does this sentence contain at least one metaphor-related lexical unit? If yes, identify the narrowest span that activates the mapping.

items.sentence_text: My paramount object in this struggle is to save the Union, and is not either to save or to destroy slavery.
items.instruction: Does this sentence contain at least one metaphor-related lexical unit? If yes, identify the narrowest span. If uncertain, record your reasoning and set ambiguity_flag.

items.focus: CMT source/target domain and cluster assignment
items.sentence_text: You have no oath registered in heaven to destroy the government, while I shall have the most solemn one to preserve, protect, and defend it.
items.instruction: This span has been identified as metaphor-related. Assign the CMT cluster, source domain, target domain, and at least one entailment.

items.focus: Koenigsberg fantasy type, violence logic, and obligatory frame
items.sentence_text: Let us diligently apply the means, never doubting that a just God, in his own good time, will give us the rightful result.
items.span_text: a just God, in his own good time, will give us the rightful result
items.instruction: This span has been identified as metaphor-related (cluster_06_providence_theodicy). Assign the fantasy type, violence logic, and obligatory frame. Explain the source of obligation in obligatory_frame_notes.

items.sentence_text: Near eighty years ago we began by declaring that all men are created equal; but now from that beginning we have run down to the other declaration, that for SOME men to enslave OTHERS is a "sacred right of self-government." These principles can not stand together.
items.span_text: Near eighty years ago we began by declaring
items.instruction: This span has been identified as metaphor-related (cluster_05_fathers_inheritance, ancestral_debt). Focus on absence and agency: which groups are implied by the inheritance frame and which are withheld from the agentive or inheriting role?
